description: Recto: The first few lines of an Ottoman-era legal document, bearing two seals and an annotation in a different hand, opening with an invocation of the chief qadi court of Cairo (bi-l-Bāb al-ʿĀlī aʿlāhu) and pertaining to a certain Hanbali judge named Aḥmad b. Aḥmad Ḥijāzī al-Ajhūrī. Verso: In Hebrew script, the name of a synagogue or congregation (קק סקאלבין?).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בArabic, Hebrew. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
